title: Ontario Design System – UI Framework
content: Design System from Directories: Components: Ontario Design System is a comprehensive toolkit developed to facilitate the creation of consistent and user-friendly digital experiences across Ontario's government services. Design System encompasses a range of design principles, guidelines, and reusable components tailored to meet the needs of various government agencies and departments. Color System Repository Layout Spacing Typography Accordion Alert banner Badges Button Cards Checkbox Data table Date picker Dropdown Icon Label Page header Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Search Text area Text field
